metadata.title: Custom Furniture Production | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered custom furniture production platform for all your manufacturing operations — from CRM and quotation builder to product variants, quality control, and project management.

hero.title: 🛋️ Furniture business
hero.description: AdonERP lets you send custom quotations, manage sales, handle production, plan custom work, and provide after-sales support.
hero.testimonialQuote: The best part is how everything is connected in AdonERP. It is not just about handling tasks, it is about making every part of our business work together seamlessly.

salesSection.title: Flexible sales
salesSection.description: Sell products and services, manage projects and tasks, build winning quotations, and present your products in the best possible light.

projectSection.title: Project management is
projectSection.description: Create, schedule, and follow up on tasks from one dashboard. Track sales orders, purchase orders, and project progress easily.

cards.bom: Flexible bills of materials support custom products, extra options, variants, and material needs.
cards.manufacturing: Easy manufacturing and purchasing keep production forecasts, costs and stock under control.

inventorySection.title: Optimized
inventorySection.description: Simplified procurement, smart replenishment and real-time inventory tools help you always get the best deal on materials.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Useful tools for custom furniture sales, production, inventory, quotations, quality and project tracking.

list.title: CRM pipeline
list.description: Track leads, custom quotes, and projects through every sales stage.

list.title: Clear traceability
list.description: Follow materials from raw stock to finished furniture pieces.

list.title: Quotation builder
list.description: Create detailed quotes with materials, labor, and custom options.

list.title: Product variants
list.description: Offer sizes, colors, wood types, and fabric options for each design.

list.title: Quality control
list.description: Inspect finished pieces and track quality metrics.

list.title: Automate procurement
list.description: Auto-create purchase orders when materials run low.

list.title: Project top bar
list.description: Visualize project progress, deadlines, and key metrics at a glance.

list.title: Worksheets
list.description: Create detailed production worksheets for shop floor workers.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your furniture business, CRM, production, inventory, and project management.

testimonials.name: Jonathan Miller
testimonials.content: The best part is how everything is connected in AdonERP. It is not just about handling tasks, it is about making every part of our business work together seamlessly.

testimonials.name: Sophia Chen
testimonials.content: From custom quotes to quality control, AdonERP transformed our furniture business. Our clients love the detailed proposals and we love the production tracking.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for custom furniture makers and manufacturers.

footerCta.eyebrowLabel: Ready to scale your furniture business
footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a custom furniture production workflow that helps you create beautiful pieces, manage materials, and deliver quality on time.
